positive: A stylized and highly detailed vector illustration of a whimsical celestial forest scene. The composition features giant, luminous bioluminescent mushrooms forming natural arches, surrounded by stylized constellations and nebula dust. In the center, a majestic, ethereal griffin made of stardust and glowing vines is perched on a crystal rock. The mood is mystical and uplifting. The style is perfect for apparel printing: clean line work, strong contrast between deep midnight blues, vibrant glowing cyan/teal accents, and touches of gold leaf. Minimalist silhouettes are key. Vector art, flat graphic design aesthetic, UHD, highly detailed, suitable for screen printing.
negative: text, logos, trademark, blurry, noisy, artifacts, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photographic, realistic, signature, low contrast, messy, cluttered, multiple characters
